title: Creating a Data Governance Framework
scenario: Develop a data governance framework for a financial institution with multiple business units and departments. The framework must include policies, procedures, and guidelines for data management, data quality, and data security. The output should be a comprehensive document in Word format.
constraints: Must use a clear and consistent formatting style throughout the document
Must include a data governance maturity model

evaluationCriteria.description: Does the framework have a clear logical structure and organization?
Does the framework adhere to the specified constraints?
Does the framework include data governance best practices and standards?
Is the tone professional, concise, and free of errors?
